prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford 289 Hi-Po (K-Code) block bored to 306ci with forged internals: Manley 4340 forged crankshaft (3.25" stroke), Manley H-beam connecting rods (5.155" length), and JE forged pistons (11.0:1 compression ratio) with Total Seal rings. Ported and polished cylinder heads by Edelbrock (PN 60999) with Ferrea 1.94" intake / 1.60" exhaust valves, Comp Cams XE274HR hydraulic roller camshaft (224°/230° duration @ .050", .540"/.552" lift), and Harland Sharp 1.6:1 roller rockers. Induction via a Holley Sniper EFI 4150 (PN 550-511K) with a custom-fabricated aluminum intake manifold by Wilson Manifolds, paired with a Paxton NOVI 2000 supercharger (8 psi boost) and intercooler setup.

Suspension overhaul with a Detroit Speed QUADRALINK 4-link rear suspension (PN 010300) featuring adjustable coilovers (RideTech 1915-100) and polygraphite bushings. Front suspension upgraded with Global West tubular upper and lower control arms (PN GSL-10 & GSL-11) with Moog ball joints, Hotchkis 1" sway bar (PN 22810), and Afco 80202 pro touring shocks. Braking system includes Baer 6P calipers (13" rotors front, 12" rear) with Hawk HT-10 brake pads and stainless steel braided lines.

Drivetrain upgrades: Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission (PN 1352-000-102) with a McLeod RST twin-disc clutch (PN 6950) and aluminum flywheel. Rear end features a Ford 9" housing with a Currie Enterprises 9+ nodular iron center section (3.70:1 gear ratio), Strange Engineering S-Trac differential, and 31-spline axles. Exhaust system by Borla (PN 40166) with 2.5" mandrel-bent stainless steel headers and X-pipe crossover, terminating in 4" rolled-edge tips.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Shelby American Originals GT350R-style fiberglass kit (PN SA-65RWB) with flared front fenders (2" wider) and rear quarter panels (3" wider). Front splitter and rear diffuser by Anderson Composites (Mustang Fastback-specific carbon fiber, PN AC-MUS65-FS & AC-MUS65-RD). Hood replaced with a carbon fiber replica of the original 1965 GT350R hood (by Cervini’s, PN 65MUS-HOOD) with functional hood scoop and heat extractors.

Wheel setup: 17x9" and 17x11" front/rear Vintage Wheel Works Vintage 56 (5-spoke) in gloss black with 245/45R17 and 295/40R17 Nitto NT05 tires. Custom center caps with Shelby Cobra emblem and red pinstriping by Advanced Plating. Interior retrimmed in black Alcantara with red stitching by Katzkin (PN 65MUS-ALC), featuring a custom roll cage by Chassisworks (8-point bolt-in, PN C65008) with harness bar and Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses.

Exterior details: Original Wimbledon White paint with Guardsman Blue racing stripes (applied by BASF Glasurit) and Shelby GT350R-style side exit exhaust cutouts. Lighting upgraded to Hella Classic 500 headlights (halogen) and LED taillights by Diode Dynamics (PN DDMUS65). Badging includes Shelby American 50th Anniversary GT350 emblem (PN SA-50GT350) and custom "289 Hi-Po" fender badges by YearOne.
